title: Vehicle Stability Assist (VSA) System Structure Description - Yaw Rate/G Sensor

blocks.text: Vehicle Stability Assist (VSA) System Structure Description - Yaw Rate/G Sensor
Yaw rate sensor (built into VSA modulator control unit)

The yaw-rate sensor uses a quartz tuning fork. A current is applied to the tuning fork to generate vibration, and the "Coriolis force" (turning force) that occurs when the vehicle turns causes the tuning fork to move, and the amount of movement is detected by voltage.
G sensor (built into VSA modulator control unit)
Gセンサは加速度が発生すると、センサ素子内の可動電極が動くために固定電極との間の静電容量を検出しGを検出している。
